Late Night Drive.vibe_sentence: Windows down, city blurring, nowhere to be.

Hollow.vibe_sentence: You're not sad. You're just completely empty.

Overflow.description: Peak euphoria — everything hits at once and it feels earned
Overflow.vibe_sentence: This is the moment you've been waiting for all year.

Adrenaline.description: Maximum output — no brakes, no ceiling
Adrenaline.vibe_sentence: No ceiling, no brakes, just output.

Villain Arc.description: Calculated, cold, and dominant — this is your theme music

Golden Hour.description: Warm and easy — that window of light where everything feels right
Golden Hour.vibe_sentence: That specific light where everything looks like it matters.

Weightless.description: Floating — dreamy and untethered, body light, head somewhere else
Weightless.vibe_sentence: Your body forgot it had weight. Float with it.

Deep Focus.description: Locks you in — instrumental, minimal, no lyrics to distract you
Deep Focus.vibe_sentence: The world disappeared. Just you and the work.

Afterparty.description: Still going at 3am but slower — the crowd is smaller and everyone knows it
Afterparty.vibe_sentence: Still going at 4am because nobody wants it to end.

Euphoric Rave.vibe_sentence: Lights off, four-on-the-floor, and you are the crowd.

Morning Ritual.description: Slow start — coffee, light, and something good happening
Morning Ritual.vibe_sentence: Coffee steam rising. The day hasn't broken you yet.

Nostalgia.description: Songs that feel like a memory even when you first heard them
Nostalgia.vibe_sentence: Songs that feel like a memory even the first time.

Acoustic Corner.description: Stripped back — just the song, nothing extra
Acoustic Corner.vibe_sentence: Just the song. Nothing else needs to be here.

Overthinking.description: 3am and your brain won't stop — introspective and a little too honest
Overthinking.vibe_sentence: Every conversation you didn't handle right, on shuffle.

Smoke & Mirrors.description: Slow, hazy, lowkey — lit in the best way
Smoke & Mirrors.vibe_sentence: Low lights, slow burn, nobody has to go home yet.

Tropicana.description: Heat, rhythm, and movement — the whole world on a dancefloor
Tropicana.vibe_sentence: Heat on skin, rhythm in bones, whole world on one floor.

Soft Hours.description: When everything needs to be gentle — tender R&B and quiet emotion
Soft Hours.vibe_sentence: Everything needs to be gentle right now. Let it.

Midnight Clarity.vibe_sentence: 4am made everything obvious and terrifying at once.

Phonk Season.description: Aggressive, drifting, and dark — the phonk spectrum
Phonk Season.vibe_sentence: Cowbell and darkness and you are drifting through all of it.

Raw Emotion.vibe_sentence: No polish. Just the feeling, uncut and loud.

Liminal.description: The in-between — empty hallways, 4am airports, spaces that feel too quiet
Liminal.vibe_sentence: Empty airport, 4am. The world between worlds.

Open Road.description: Windows down, no destination, just motion
Open Road.vibe_sentence: No destination. Just the highway and the volume.

Sundown.description: End of day ease — calm but not sad, quiet but not empty
Sundown.vibe_sentence: End of day, slow exhale, still in one piece.

Flex Tape.description: Loud, arrogant, and proud of it
Flex Tape.vibe_sentence: Loud, arrogant, and completely unapologetic about it.

Hard Reset.description: Controlled destruction — the catharsis of volume
Hard Reset.vibe_sentence: Volume as medicine. Scream it out, start clean.

Dark Pop.description: Polished darkness — pop aesthetics draped in shadow
Dark Pop.vibe_sentence: Pop aesthetics wearing shadow like a second skin.

Slow Jams.description: Bedroom hours — sensual, low-lit, and unhurried

Emo Hour.description: Every feeling at maximum volume — melodic, angsty, and real
Emo Hour.vibe_sentence: Every feeling at maximum volume, and it still isn't enough.

Jazz Nights.description: Smoky, late, and unhurried — the music of rooms with low ceilings

Drill.description: Dark melody, rolling percussion, cold street energy
Drill.vibe_sentence: Cold melody, sliding 808, no warmth intended.

Neo-Soul.description: Warm, textured, and conscious — music that nourishes
Neo-Soul.vibe_sentence: Warm bass, conscious groove, music that nourishes the chest.

Psychedelic.description: Layers upon layers — music that rewires how you hear it
Psychedelic.vibe_sentence: Layers upon layers. Time started doing something strange.

Heartbreak.vibe_sentence: You're not crying. You're seething. There's a difference.

Indie Bedroom.description: Hazy, soft, and personal — music that feels like it was made just for you
Indie Bedroom.vibe_sentence: Music that feels like it was made in your room, for your room.

Country Roads.description: Honest storytelling, open skies, and dusty boots
Country Roads.vibe_sentence: Honest words, dusty boots, and an open sky saying nothing.

Gospel Fire.description: Call and response, choir swells, and something larger than yourself
Gospel Fire.vibe_sentence: The kind of joy that makes your chest hurt.

Old School Hip-Hop.description: Boom bap, vinyl samples, and bars that actually say something

K-Pop Zone.description: Choreography energy, polished chaos, and infectious hooks
K-Pop Zone.vibe_sentence: Choreographed chaos, perfect hooks, no apologies for the glitter.

Sunday Reset.description: Nothing urgent, nothing heavy — just exist for a while
Sunday Reset.vibe_sentence: Nothing urgent. Nothing heavy. Just exist for a while.

Synthwave Nights.description: Neon grid, chrome reflections, driving through a city that never existed
Synthwave Nights.vibe_sentence: Neon grid, chrome city, driving through a future that never happened.

Hyperpop.description: Too much of everything — chaotic, glitchy, and weirdly emotional
Hyperpop.vibe_sentence: Too much of everything — and somehow that's exactly right.

Goth / Darkwave.description: Beautiful desolation — post-punk emotions wearing black

Rainy Window.vibe_sentence: Grey sky, warm mug, songs that hug the quiet.

Metal Storm.vibe_sentence: Double kicks and screaming and it still isn't loud enough.

Classical Calm.description: Strings, piano, and breathing room for your brain

Rage Lift.description: PR sets, PR attitude — metal and rap aggression in one lane

Healing Kind.description: Soft affirmations and warmth after a hard week

Disco Lights.description: Four-on-the-floor glitter — mirrorball nostalgia meets now
Disco Lights.vibe_sentence: Mirrorball spinning, everyone's beautiful, and the night agrees.

Amapiano Sunset.vibe_sentence: Log drums and golden-hour groove, from South Africa to everywhere.

Punk Sprint.vibe_sentence: Two minutes of truth. Circle pit not optional.

Dream Pop Haze.description: Reverb for days — shoegaze haze and cotton-candy vocals

Warehouse Techno.description: Strobe ethics — rolling kicks and tunnel vision
Warehouse Techno.vibe_sentence: Strobe ethics. Rolling kicks and tunnel vision, hours gone.

Anime OST Energy.vibe_sentence: Opening theme energy — the protagonist finally stood up.

Chillhop Cafe.description: Jazz chords, lazy drums, café chatter optional

Meditation Bath.description: Bowls, pads, and breath — no lyrics required

Anime Openings.description: OP energy — TV-size hype and drama
Anime Openings.vibe_sentence: OP chills every time, even episode 47.

Songs About Goodbye.description: Leaving, endings, and moving on — any genre, same story

Songs About Home.vibe_sentence: The town you left still lives somewhere behind your sternum.

3 AM Unsent Texts.vibe_sentence: You typed it. You deleted it. Now play this instead.

Shoegaze Breakups.vibe_sentence: Walls of guitar. The haze is the heartbreak.

Queer Dance Confetti.vibe_sentence: Pride-floor joy — love, full volume, unapologetic.

Metal Testimony.vibe_sentence: Faith and fury — the spirit moving through crushing riffs.

Bedroom Pop Diary.description: Intimate vocals and overthinking — diary-entry lyrics

Minimal Techno Tunnel.vibe_sentence: Hypnotic four-on-the-floor. The next hour dissolved completely.

Hyperpop Emotional Crash.description: Glitchy highs and vulnerable lyrics — digital heartbreak

Industrial Gothic Floor.vibe_sentence: Mechanical beats and cold glamour — the warehouse is the runway.

Kawaii Metal Sparkle.vibe_sentence: Idol hooks over crushing riffs — adorable, and somehow terrifying.

Pluggnb Heartache.vibe_sentence: Auto-Tune tears dripping over trap clouds at 2am.

Cinematic Swell.description: Orchestral film score energy, swelling strings, emotional peaks
Cinematic Swell.vibe_sentence: The music when the thing you were waiting for finally happens.

Breakup Bravado.description: Post-breakup strength anthems, better off without them energy

Campfire Sessions.description: Acoustic guitar around the fire, singalong folk warmth

Grief Wave.description: Processing loss slowly, heavy and tender, not angry

Piano Bar.description: Sophisticated late-night piano jazz and standards

Trap & Chill.description: Laid-back trap, hazy beats, no aggression

Acoustic Soul.vibe_sentence: Guitar and voice and nothing else needed to explain a thing.

Retro Future.vibe_sentence: The future the 80s imagined, running on cassette and neon hope.

Midnight Gospel.vibe_sentence: It's 2am and the universe started explaining itself.

Bedroom Confessions.vibe_sentence: 3am honesty that would never survive the daylight.

Sea of Feels.description: Emotional overwhelm, tears that feel necessary and earned
